name: Hearty Soup Mix and Stock
recipeIngredient: 1 (14 oz) package dry green split peas
recipeInstructions:
HEARTY SOUP MIX: Combine all ingredients in a large airtight container. Stir to evenly distribute ingredients. Label the container and store it in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 months. Shake before using.
Makes about 12- 1/2 cups of Hearty Soup Mix.
HEARTY SOUP STOCK:
Put 6 cups water in a large kettle or Dutch oven. Add 1 1/3 cups Hearty Soup Mix and salt. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 1 to 1/2 hours.
Add celery, cabbage, tomato sauce, and vegetable juice cocktail. Continue simmering until vegetables are cooked, about 20 more minutes.
If desired, add cooked ground beef or other leftover meat. Serve and enjoy!
